retry_reason: If the function returns NULL, the underlying net_device does not exist or is not a valid real device; retrying is unlikely to change that.
contract_summary: This wrapper acquires a reference (increments the reference count) on the real underlying net_device associated with the given net_device. It handles the rtnl locking internally, so the caller does not need to hold any locks. The caller must call dev_put() on the returned net_device pointer when it is no longer needed. If the function returns NULL, no reference is taken and the caller should not attempt to dev_put().
